arts.ttl: Celtic vs Bayern Munich – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Celtic welcome Bayern Munich to Glasgow this evening in the Champions League’s play-off round. The Scottish champions are into the knockout stages for the first time in over a decade. Brendan Rodgers will be hoping his team can continue an impressive campaign with an upset of the German giants.
